channel.title: theprofessor TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from theprofessor

item.title: The cross to the dude losing a tooth to the miss lay is insane 🤯😖😒😒 Sneakers: Anta Shockwave 7 Anta.com

item.title: Just landed in Abu Dhabi🛫🌍 The 2025 GlobalHooper Tour continues. Trying to get to a few more countries before the year is out! This one is gonna be special though. More details on the park takeover out there coming soon!
item.description: Just landed in Abu Dhabi🛫🌍 The 2025 GlobalHooper Tour continues. Trying to get to a few more countries before the year is out! This one is gonna be special though. More details on the park takeover out there coming soon!

item.title: Park Takeover with @MK out here in 📍Abu Dhabi tonight at Corniche Beach Court 7pm. Pull up!
item.description: Park Takeover with @MK out here in 📍Abu Dhabi tonight at Corniche Beach Court 7pm. Pull up!

item.title: MK + The Professor at NBA District in Abu Dhabi🇦🇪 @MK …The morning after the biggest park takeover in history. Wait until we run it back, coming soon😉 @Visit Abu Dhabi @NBA Arabic #inabidhabi
item.description: MK + The Professor at NBA District in Abu Dhabi🇦🇪 @MK …The morning after the biggest park takeover in history. Wait until we run it back, coming soon😉 @Visit Abu Dhabi @NBA Arabic #inabidhabi

item.title: Dribble Combo with @Ty (Shortest dunker in the world at 5’4”) 😮‍💨🎧🎯 How did we do?
item.description: Dribble Combo with @Ty (Shortest dunker in the world at 5’4”) 😮‍💨🎧🎯 How did we do?

item.title: Park Takeover mode activated☑️😎
item.description: Park Takeover mode activated☑️😎

item.title: 🚨Challenge Issued🚨 Complete(emulate) this dribble sequence best you can, post and use hashtag #HandleReady25 (HandleReady ‘25 Challenge). I’m hosting this mainly in IG but if you only have TikTok and submit here I’ll check it out. Feel free to use my same
item.description: 🚨Challenge Issued🚨 Complete(emulate) this dribble sequence best you can, post and use hashtag #HandleReady25 (HandleReady ‘25 Challenge). I’m hosting this mainly in IG but if you only have TikTok and submit here I’ll check it out. Feel free to use my same

item.title: #RedNets #StateFarmPartner Hoopers know how satisfying that perfect swish sound is! No net, no swish. That's why I teamed up with State Farm on their mission to leave no court without a net.Visit st.fm/rednets for a chance to secure a brand-new net on you
item.description: #RedNets #StateFarmPartner Hoopers know how satisfying that perfect swish sound is! No net, no swish. That's why I teamed up with State Farm on their mission to leave no court without a net.Visit st.fm/rednets for a chance to secure a brand-new net on you

item.title: I’m coming to LEVEL UP at Dubai Harbour TOMORROW (November 27) it’s Dubai’s biggest sports tech event. I’ll be running a workshop and running 1v1, so pull up! Also doing a meet and greet! Let’s LEVEL UP.😎 @Level Up Sports Tech #LevelUpExpo #TechElevatesTh
item.description: I’m coming to LEVEL UP at Dubai Harbour TOMORROW (November 27) it’s Dubai’s biggest sports tech event. I’ll be running a workshop and running 1v1, so pull up! Also doing a meet and greet! Let’s LEVEL UP.😎 @Level Up Sports Tech #LevelUpExpo #TechElevatesTh

item.title: 1st Park Takeover in Dubai 😎☑️ Thank you to everyone who pulled up last night! 🙏🏼 Live Fam Dubai was a movie🍿🎥
item.description: 1st Park Takeover in Dubai 😎☑️ Thank you to everyone who pulled up last night! 🙏🏼 Live Fam Dubai was a movie🍿🎥

item.title: 📍Dubai Red Bull Half Court World Final LED Court Reveal✨🕌 🐪🌴 🏙️🇦🇪🏀 The World Finals at the Jumeirah Emirates Towers was insane!🔥🔥 @redbulluae
item.description: 📍Dubai Red Bull Half Court World Final LED Court Reveal✨🕌 🐪🌴 🏙️🇦🇪🏀 The World Finals at the Jumeirah Emirates Towers was insane!🔥🔥 @redbulluae

item.title: An hour at the office in Dubai 🎥🎞️🏀 Details of 2nd Dubai Park Takeover coming soon… @redbulluae #RedBull
item.description: An hour at the office in Dubai 🎥🎞️🏀 Details of 2nd Dubai Park Takeover coming soon… @redbulluae #RedBull

item.title: Live Fam Dubai goes crazy! Appreciate y’all! Part takeover #2 is on Wednesday. Details coming soon! #LiveFam #Dubai @redbulluae
item.description: Live Fam Dubai goes crazy! Appreciate y’all! Part takeover #2 is on Wednesday. Details coming soon! #LiveFam #Dubai @redbulluae

item.title: 📍Dubai Court Takeover #2 TOMORROW night at Uptown Mirdif basketball court! 7-9pm. Supporters Pull Up, Hoopers Pull Up! Going to run 1’s then meet and greet after. See yall up there! #LiveFam #RedBull @redbulluae
item.description: 📍Dubai Court Takeover #2 TOMORROW night at Uptown Mirdif basketball court! 7-9pm. Supporters Pull Up, Hoopers Pull Up! Going to run 1’s then meet and greet after. See yall up there! #LiveFam #RedBull @redbulluae

item.title: They gotta work harder ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ | LA & SoCal hoopers get in on the @LA Clippers 3v3 tournament coming up in January. Registration is open now! Learn more at Clippers.com/3v3 #ClippersPartner
item.description: They gotta work harder ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ | LA & SoCal hoopers get in on the @LA Clippers 3v3 tournament coming up in January. Registration is open now! Learn more at Clippers.com/3v3 #ClippersPartner
